title: cleistocactus samaipatanus subsp. divi-miseratus
intro: Cleistocactus samaipatanus subsp. divi-miseratus is a rare and endemic cactus species found in Bolivia, belonging to the Echinopsis genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cleistocactus samaipatanus subsp. divi-miseratus include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease congestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
